emails.body: FW: K #27291 Invoices not capturing incremental fees for alternate points Richard, can you check this out for me. Did the team drop the ball on this one? Thanks. Lynn To: Watson, Kimberly; Blair, Lynn; Dietz, Rick; Donoho, Lindy

emails.subject:
RE: K #27291 - Invoices not capturing incremental fees for
 alternate points
emails.subject_base:
K #27291 - Invoices not capturing incremental fees for
 alternate points
emails.body: RE: K #27291 Invoices not capturing incremental fees for alternate points This adjustment will result in approximately $7800 in additional revenues. One way to prevent this situation in the future would be for the rep and or myself to ensure that Duke's rate has been increased when they have alternate deliveries to the border. If these alternate deliveries exist and the rate has not been increased then the rep needs to bring this situation to the attention of the marketer.

emails.body: RE: K #27291 Invoices not capturing incremental fees for alternate points Richard, did this get properly taken care of? Thanks. Lynn
